# Test Fixtures

## Provided Fixtures

Place the following files in `provided/`:

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `official_document.jpg` | Scan of an official document (passport, ID, invoice) |
| `family_photo.jpg` | Photograph with people/scenery |
| `screenshot.png` | PNG screenshot or diagram |
| `multipage.pdf` | Multi-page PDF with text and images |
| `sample.xlsx` | Small XLSX spreadsheet |
| `sample.docx` | DOCX file with text |
| `ambiguous_image.jpg` | Abstract/ambiguous image |

## Generated Fixtures

Generated automatically by test setup. See `generated/` directory.
